phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Water Lilies rooms are
phrases.text_local: Où sont les salles des Nymphéas, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo sohn lay sal day nim-FAY-ah, seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: Monet's Nymphéas (Water Lilies) occupy two large oval rooms on the ground floor, designed by the artist himself. The paintings are 2 meters high and 91 meters long in total. Monet donated them to the French state in 1922 as 'a gift of peace'.

responses.english: The Water Lilies are on the ground floor, in the oval rooms.
responses.phonetic: lay nahm-fay-AH sohn toh ray-duh-shoh-SAY, dahn lay sal oh-VAL
responses.local: Les Nymphéas sont au rez-de-chaussée, dans les salles ovales.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if timed entry to the oval rooms is required
phrases.text_local: Faut-il réserver une entrée à heure fixe pour les salles ovales ?
phrases.pronunciation: foh-TEEL ray-zur-VAY oon ahn-TRAY ah ur FEEX poor lay sal oh-VAL
phrases.cultural_note: Entry to the Nymphéas oval rooms is managed by timed slots to avoid overcrowding. The rooms are best experienced with few people — try to visit early on a weekday morning.

responses.english: No, you can go directly into the rooms.
responses.phonetic: nohn, voo poo-VAY ahn-TRAY dee-rek-tuh-MAHN dahn lay sal
responses.local: Non, vous pouvez entrer directement dans les salles.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Picasso and Matisse collection is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la collection Picasso et Matisse ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah koh-lek-SYOHN pee-KAH-soh ay mah-TEES
phrases.cultural_note: The lower level (niveau inférieur) houses the Walter-Guillaume collection featuring works by Picasso, Matisse, Renoir, Cézanne, and Modigliani. This is a separate and often overlooked gem within the museum.

responses.english: The collection is in the basement, after the Water Lilies.
responses.phonetic: lah koh-lek-SYOHN eh toh soo-sol, ah-PREH lay nahm-fay-AH
responses.local: La collection est au sous-sol, après les Nymphéas.

phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous me donner un plan du musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-RYAY voo muh doh-NAY uhn plahn doo moo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: The museum is compact — two floors with only a handful of rooms — so a map helps orient you quickly. The ground floor has the Nymphéas; the lower level has the rest of the permanent collection.

responses.english: Maps are free at the reception.
responses.phonetic: lay plahn sohn grah-TWEET ah lah-KUH-ee
responses.local: Les plans sont gratuits à l'accueil.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how long the visit usually takes
phrases.text_local: Combien de temps dure généralement la visite ?
phrases.pronunciation: kohm-BYEHN duh tahn DOOR zhay-nay-ral-MAHN lah vee-ZEET
phrases.cultural_note: Most visitors spend 1-2 hours at the Orangerie. The Nymphéas rooms invite you to sit and contemplate — benches are placed in each oval room for exactly this purpose.

responses.english: Allow about one to one and a half hours.
responses.phonetic: kohn-TAY ahn-vee-ROHN oon uhr ah oon uhr ay duh-MEE
responses.local: Comptez environ une heure à une heure et demie.
